MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Revised Physical Anhedonia Scale - short form (RPAS, 15 items)
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: For each of the following items, select either True or False.

phys_anhed_1.Description: I have often found walks to be relaxing and enjoyable.

phys_anhed_2.Description: A brisk walk has sometimes made me feel good all over.

phys_anhed_3.Description: The sound of the rain falling on the roof has made me feel snug and secure.

phys_anhed_4.Description: After a busy day, a slow walk has often felt relaxing.

phys_anhed_5.Description: The beauty of sunsets is greatly overrated.

phys_anhed_6.Description: The sound of rustling leaves has never much pleased me.

phys_anhed_7.Description: It has often felt good to massage my muscles when they are tired or sore.

phys_anhed_8.Description: Flowers aren't as beautiful as many people claim.

phys_anhed_9.Description: I like playing with and petting soft little kittens or puppies.

phys_anhed_10.Description: I don't understand why people enjoy looking at the stars at night.

phys_anhed_11.Description: When I'm feeling a little sad, singing has often made me feel happier.

phys_anhed_12.Description: Beautiful scenery has been a great delight to me.

phys_anhed_13.Description: The first winter snowfall has often looked pretty to me.

phys_anhed_14.Description: A good soap lather when I'm bathing has sometimes soothed and refreshed me.

phys_anhed_15.Description: Standing on a high place and looking out over the view is very exciting.

rpasShort_score_total.Description: Physical anhedonia total (RPAS short): items 5,6,8,10 scored as-is (True=1) plus items 1,2,3,4,7,9,11,12,13,14,15 reverse-coded (1-x), then summed. Range 0-15. n/a if any item missing.
